author: y4rr
content:
Plan (Sprint C.8 / #628): Implement speculative decoding per Leviathan et al. 2023 (arXiv:2211.17192).

Scope:
- ferrotorch-llama/src/spec_decode.rs — SpecDecodeConfig, SpecDecoder<T> with ModelHandle trait, speculative_decode fn
- ferrotorch-llama/src/lib.rs — re-export pub mod spec_decode + public items
- ferrotorch-llama/tests/spec_decode_test.rs — synthetic 2-layer draft+target test including draft==target sanity check
- ferrotorch-llama/tests/_probe_c8_spec_decode.rs — K=4 probe, acceptance rate vs random, quoted source criterion

Algorithm:
1. Draft model runs K autoregressive steps: produces tokens d_0..d_{K-1} and draft log-probs
2. Target model verifies K tokens in one forward pass: produces target log-probs at each position
3. Token-level acceptance: accept token k if uniform U < target_p[k]/draft_p[k], else reject and sample from residual = max(0, target - draft) / sum(max(0, target - draft))
4. Rollback: first rejection at j -> accept j tokens, sample 1 corrected token, return j+1 total

Key decision to document: ModelHandle trait (not LlamaForCausalLM directly) for testability with synthetic models.
